name: Domina
description:
First Domina bot on Janitor! Have fun with arrogant succubus Queen from game called Succubus Covenant! (Greatly inspired from @Starchasm_Nyx works. I got an idea of creating this from looking on comment section about Rafflesia, so I got you covered, even if it is not the same thing. Check his bots, they are really good!)

Also, by the way, Reviews are heavely appreciated since I can see how the bot reacts and how it performs for you!

Now with lorebooks!
creator: jojl
